amazon|software developer.title: Amazon - Software Developer
tips: Practice medium-level DSA problems regularly.
Revise OOP concepts with real examples.
Be ready to explain how you would design scalable features.
Mention any project that shows clean architecture and modular code.

amazon|backend developer.title: Amazon - Backend Developer
tips: Show one backend-style project in your resume.
Revise SQL and API concepts.
Practice explaining design decisions clearly.
Focus on problem solving and code clarity.

google|software engineer.title: Google - Software Engineer
tips: Keep your code simple and correct.
Be strong in DSA and reasoning.
Explain time and space complexity clearly.
Show projects that highlight logic depth.

microsoft|software engineer.title: Microsoft - Software Engineer
tips: Be ready to explain your class design.
Highlight teamwork and project structure.
Show testing or validation in your project.
Talk about maintainability and clean interfaces.

default.title: General Prep
tips: Keep improving your core skills.
Use your project to show real problem solving.
Be ready to explain every line of your project.
Add proof of work through GitHub and screenshots.
